articles.title: Megyn Kelly, 55, Melts Down Over ‘Supergirl’ Star, 26
articles.description: Reuters Right-wing commentator Megyn Kelly spent Monday raging against the “loathsome” star of Supergirl , Australian actress Milly Alcock. On her namesake show , Kelly, 55, declared that the newest superhero movie in the DC Comics universe was “woke” and several years too late to be relevant. Its 26-year-old lead, she added, was the “weird, short girl with the very strange look.” “We’re over the forced-upon-us girlboss era. It’s not authentic. It’s not organic. We’re no longer buying it,” Kelly said. “It’s not that women can’t be empowered and fierce and all the great things. It’s just, stop forcing it on us in the form of Supergirl .” Read more at The Daily Beast.
